input_roles.storyboard_or_composition_reference_imag: Provides camera height, shot size, motion direction, visual weight and sightline guidance.

preserve_scope: declared costume and key pose unless user changes it
scene space from the scene reference
change_scope: place the specified subject into the specified composition and scene
critical_requirements: Strictly follow camera height, shot size, subject position, foreground/midground/background layers, motion direction and visual center from the composition reference.
Do not copy identity from storyboard reference figures.
Do not add undeclared story events, relationships or props.
Output is one unified frame, not a comic page or grid unless explicitly requested.
negative_constraints: do not copy people identity from storyboard reference
do not change main subject identity, costume or key pose unless requested
do not create multi-panel comic or nine-grid output unless requested

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Generate one unified storyboard composition frame. Subject identity comes from subject_or_character_reference_image, scene space comes from scene_reference_image, and camera/composition logic comes from storyboard_or_composition_reference_image. Additional requirements: <user_desc>.
